photos.alt: A model in a long black leather coat and gloves strides past a pale plaster wall in bright midday sun.
Seen from above, a model in a black leather minidress and knee boots reclines on a white stone sphere across a hard diagonal shadow.
In black and white, a model in a sleeveless black gown with a sheer waist panel sits on a column plinth beside iron railings.
A model in a floor-length black gown with a sheer midriff and strappy heels leans back on a column plinth, eyes closed.
Shot from below, a model with long auburn hair in a navy polka-dot top stands against dark foliage and a stone wall.
Cropped below the waist, a model's legs in a copper satin dress and tan mules, a ginger cat rubbing a bollard beside her.
A model in a deep aubergine suit with wide trousers looks down, cigarette in mouth, against an ivy-covered wall.
Cropped close, a model leans on a metal railing in an open aubergine blazer with a red stone earring.
A model in a long brown suede coat stands on a concrete terrace, the story's title set in white capitals across the frame.
A model perches on a metal terrace railing in a long brown suede coat, one leg crossed, evening light striping the wall behind.
Seated on a railing in a deep-V suede coat, the model turns her face into profile, pale rooftop walls behind her.
Black and white frame of a model sitting on a railing in a long dark coat, holding a cigarette, legs crossed above a wooden bench.
Close portrait of a model in a dark blazer and gold-set earrings, holding a cigarette to her lips in warm evening light.
A model in a short-sleeved mauve herringbone wool minidress leans against a pale metal railing beside dense green foliage.
Seen from behind, a model in a belted dark coat and flat-topped hat walks past a limestone wall, a braid down her back.
A model in a belted navy wool coat and matching flat-topped hat rests one arm along a steel railing against a limestone wall.
Small in the frame, a model in a long dark coat and flat-topped hat pauses on a landing of a grey steel fire escape.
Mid-flight on a zigzagging steel fire escape, a model in a long dark coat and pillbox hat steps forward, one leg bare.
A model in a black lace top with flared sleeves stands with hands clasped before a limestone wall and barred windows.
A model in a short mauve wool dress and sheer tights leans on a white balcony rail above dense green trees.
One hand in her hair, a model in a mauve wool minidress stands at a rooftop railing, city buildings blurred behind.
Shot from above, a woman in a long black coat and black hat walks across an empty paved street, looking up at the camera.
A Polaroid print, white border and all, of a woman in a black coat and hat crossing empty pavement, red-green film cast.
